desc:
Vault 96 was a Vault-Tec facility in Fallout 76 that was publicly advertised as a genetic ark for preserving and reintroducing species after a nuclear war. Its true purpose was genetic experimentation on mutated creatures to create countermeasures to the post-nuclear wasteland’s threats. The vault staff were forced to meet weekly research quotas or face termination by the vault’s robot security.
Grid F3 (X: 2265, Y: 912)
